heading: Status, immunities, and privileges
label: 290m–1 Status, immunities, and privileges
text: Article VIII of Chapter II of the Cooperation Agreement shall have full force and effect in the United States, its territories and possessions, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, upon entry into force of the Cooperation Agreement.
